title: dryopteris decipiens
intro: Dryopteris decipiens, also known as the deceptively named "deceptive fern," is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and acting as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of Dryopteris decipiens can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
